$schema_note: Momentum Top-3/Top-5 ten-year research config. Signals use month-end closes; targets fill at the next session close after the prior book earns that day's return. Current-universe, corporate-action, and in-sample-selection limitations make outputs non-decision-grade.

universe.note: current constituents scraped from Wikipedia -> survivorship bias; neither absolute performance nor in-sample cross-strategy ranking is decision-grade

strategies.label: 旗舰 · 11月动量 Top3
strategies.thesis: 11m total return with 3-name concentration; selected in-sample from a 40-variant sweep and retained only as a research hypothesis.

strategies.label: 均衡 · 9月动量 Top3
strategies.thesis: 9m lookback is a faster concentrated research variant; relative ranking versus other variants remains in-sample.

strategies.label: 宽度 · 11月动量 Top5
strategies.thesis: Exact 11m breadth control: the score, dates, costs, and universe match RET_11M_top3 so only concentration changes.

live_plan.note: 纸面研究：3个月分3批等额跟随月末信号，不对应任何真实账户或执行记录
